phase.name: Project Scaffold and Title Screen
phase.goal: Vite + KAPLAY + TypeScript project running, styled title screen with New Game button

phase.name: Room Navigation
phase.goal: Styled rooms with icons, themed colors per room type, exit buttons, fog of war

phase.name: Combat Encounter
phase.goal: Turn-based combat with HP bars, action buttons, enemy sprites, damage numbers, return to room

phase.name: Rune Forge and Spell Crafting
phase.goal: Player combines runes to create spells at forge room, uses crafted spells in combat

phase.name: Dialogue System
phase.goal: NPC dialogue with portraits, branching choices, gameplay effects

phase.name: HUD and Menus
phase.goal: Persistent HUD with HP/mana bars, overlay menus (Map, Spellbook, Bag)

phase.name: Content Packs and Save/Load
phase.goal: JSON content packs, localStorage persistence, leveling system

phase.name: Polish and Production Build
phase.goal: Full game loop verification, visual polish, production dist build
